content: The healing penalty from the game mode acts abnormally with Salvador's "End of Suffering" and the Crimson Furnace mechanic - in particular, it double dips with "Dedication"

For clarity, I have ~110% healing bonus currently:

Expected: Dedication provides 260 Maximum HP to 536 Furnace:

Result: Displayed amount is 260 -> 268, recieved amount is 134.

Additionally, Furnace size seems to have been cut in half, and healing from the furnace heals a normal amount of HP instead of healing half of the normal amount (this is where healing penalties, such as Bottomless Scar and Blighten, normally apply)
Happy to provide additional screenshots, unbuffed screenshots, or a futher explanation of comparisons to standard mechanics on request.
The same effects also apply to his Furnace Gain from "Blessed be the Bones" and "Defense" - applying abnormally twice when they shouldn't be applying at all.
This is also applying to "Blessed are the Bones" - expected furnace gain is halved on card display and halved again on actual gain:
(The value should be 216)
And again to "Defense":
(Furnace Gain should be 42)

All of this, combined with the undocumented halving of Furnace size, essentially renders Salvador unusable in the game mode as a damage dealer, as his scaling is a quarter of what is intended and the furnace cap is too low.
This also applies to exalt/overexalt, but a bit differently: Displayed gain here is correct at 52% conversion, but resulting gain is halved abnormally.
The bug also compounds in Ultra Turn, which also is now reducing displayed Furnace gain abnormally, but unlike the mode penalty isn't double dipping (but still should not be applying at all):
Never mind, this is also double dipping, since the 25% healing penalty for Ultra Turn is also being applied when spending Furnace to heal (which is intended behaviour)
Furnace Cap reduction screenshots.
It's at ~20% of intended amount.
Bizarrely, shield conversion is doubled.
Rusted Saw also seems bugged with this, but still testing how.
I'm not even sure what's gone on here:
Oh such detailed feedback! Let me take a look<:Pandia_love:1459078512303411261> .

Thanks! I have a very high level Salvador and i'm slogging through Normal Mode on the new game mode with the bugs, so i'm trying to catalogue everything I see - I can also test Ultra Turn outside of the game mode to see if the new bug with Ultra Turn Furnace Gain is applying there too.
Happy to also answer questions about previous behaviour and give an explanation on it all.
Bottomless Scar appears to still function correctly (no effect on Furnace Gain, but reduces healing from Furnace when the Furnace is used)

-----POST-HOTFIX CHANGES-----

Redemption (Furnace -> Shield) now works properly.
Furnace Heal is now halved by Motion Vertigo, which is in line with Bottomless Scar and Blighten.
Dedication (HP -> Furnace) still has a bug on it - Motion Vertigo is being incorrectly applied to Dedication, causing a double-dip effect with the Furnace Heal.

The first bug (where it was double-halving) has however been fixed, but the second (where it shouldn't be reduced at all, as Salvador's Dedication is normally unaffected by Penalties) is still applying here.
Documenting furnace heal halving - this is correct behaviour, but is also why Dedication shouldn't be halving.
Will test Ultra Turn interactions next.
Ultra turn is also double-dipping in the same way, where it didn't used to before 09/02
This part works as expected with Ultra Turn.
Essentially, Dedication is still bugged, but the other bugs appear to have been fixed.
<@1131790839291596841> It seems part of it is fixed, but some is still not, the part directly tied to Salvador (and ultra turn)^
Yeah the bugs on Salvador's 3 cost, 2 cost, and Defense are still there.
I should have 448 STR

thread_title: ✅「Resolved」Bug after fighting Ch4 boss in the train mode and killing it when it enters Ultra turn

content:
The rewards for beating the hard mode missions of the new Train game mode are limited to 1 month only.
Considering that the runs take some time, and you probably need to level up the meta progression tree to have a good chance at beating the hard mode, that require previous runs in normal mode that are themselves long too, could the missions time window be extended a bit?
Considering one need to win with all specific realm combinations, with that particular number of units, that is already a bit hard by itself for new players with less expansive rosters.
Why am I only getting 4.5k from 3 defends when it should be over 5.5k? I ran this stage several times before the recent patch and never noticed this being an issue until now.

content: Had a normal mode run where ch 4 dog boss died to poison right as it was about to use its ultra gimmick, I believe this caused a bug in which I no longer draw new cards each turn.

I think most End of Chapter bosses are coded differently from other fights because they were not supposed to be other ones after them, so they should do a general pass to remove all ongoing effects, like other normal fights.
Thank you for your feedback<:Pandia_love:1459078512303411261> . We are aware of this "unable to draw cards" bug and will fix it in a future update.

seems a similar problem from https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1470270601586413621 too.
I think all the Final fights effects need a pass to cleanse them at the end of them.
💭「Processing」HSR Dog Bug
Yes, we have considered this method for fixing the bug, but please refer to the final solution.
珍惜还是珍惜……
looking into this!
The translation of 造成伤害 is indeed inconsistent here! Thank you for letting us know, and we'll unify it across his intentions!
thank you for the interest, would it be possible to have some info on this too? https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1457848108628054067

✅「已回答」求助！这是什么bug！

After doing this event and checking my daily tasks I saw that for 50 cards played it was still written as 0/50. 

I didn't finish whole stage there cuz there's too much fights to do all at once so I saved and exit event for now. Maybe that's why??? But still I think even then all that cards played should be counted (especially cuz it's saved progress so cards should be memorized too?). And there was def muchhh more than 50 cards played. 

So maybe check/fix that cuz I'm sure there r many who won't do whole thing in 1 go (if that's required for cards played to count).
Thank you very much for your suggestion. We have added this solution to our game optimization plan<:lotan_proud:1468258456006955010> .
✅「Answered」New train event

Thank u for fast answer 🥰
I was just really confused seeing 0 cards played lol
I was like what I was doing til now then? 🧐🤣
